steps.title: Double the wall area
steps.content: Painting the room twice means covering the wall area twice. Since the wall area is $w$, the total painted area is $2w$ square feet.

steps.title: Use the coverage rate
steps.content: One gallon covers $80$ square feet, so divide the total painted area by $80$: $$ P=\frac{2w}{80}=\frac{w}{40} $$ The answer is D.
